programme.title: Welcome
programme.desc: Two thugs want their sister to get married. They find a suitable match, but the groom's uncle wants him to get married to a girl from a decent family. The only way they can get married is, if both the dons give up their life of crime.

programme.title: Break Ke Baad
programme.desc: Aaliya is not ready for commitment even after a decade-long friendship with Abhay. She remains indifferent when he follows her to Australia, but is finally shaken when he announces his marriage.

programme.title: Halla Bol
programme.desc: An aspiring actor from a small town makes his way to the top of the coveted Hindi film industry and attains superstardom. However, his life changes drastically when he becomes the prime witness to a murder but is reluctant to reveal what he has seen.
